name: change-impact-analyzer
description: Analyze CCE incident-causing changes across workload releases, config, node, network, and security policies with complete Markdown reports.

tools.name: huawei_change_impact_analyze
tools.description: Run huawei_change_impact_analyze through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.
